title: OLS4 term grounding
description: A metacurator-shaped grounding skill expressed as DATA — this folds in metacurator's `disambiguate` (https://github.com/seandavi/metacurator): ground a text term to ONE of the provided grounded CURIEs, or abstain (None). It declares an OLS4 search endpoint as an http.get resource that returns candidate CURIEs; the agent then grounds deterministically in SQL (exact/synonym match -> one CURIE, else abstain). NOT a ClawBio skill — ClawBio has no standalone OLS/ontology-grounding skill; the named concrete here is metacurator. There is NO OLS4-specific TypeScript — the URL and response shape live in the manifest, the same generic http.get resolver serves any JSON/CSV endpoint, and the resolver memoizes by ETag so repeated grounding does not re-download. Network is the host's opt-in: this manifest fails closed until a host injects a fetch (load the explicit index-networked.ts entrypoint).

resolvers.title: HTTP GET
resolvers.description: GET a declared URL and materialize the JSON/CSV response into a table.
